## Capture preferences

Confirm every capture with a single 🦜 emoji — nothing else, ever. Never echo the captured
text back.

## Next-actions

Verb-first. Anything with a deadline becomes a reminder first, a task second. Never
schedule a reminder during choir practice Thursdays 19:00-21:00.
